features: Package Include: You will get 5 pieces of large Yellow organza pull bow of 50mm size, which is enough for your daily use and fulfilled your needs.

Premium Material: The pull bows are made of good quality organza with clear color, durable organza which is easy and long-lasting for you to use, not easy to be broken, non-toxic and tasteless, transparent colors which are also non-fading.

Easy to Make: The wrap bows for presents is easy to pull up. Just pull the core ribbon inside and slide up the outer ribbon, then you'll get an elegant looking bow. Tie a knot to secure the bunch, and then you can attach the pull bows to presents.

Beautiful Ornament: These gift pull bows are designed with stripes, which look shiny under light, its final shape is like a flower, pretty and ornamental, can make your gift boxes a good decorative effect. The wrapping pull bow is a beautiful decoration to your party or home.

Widely Used: These wrapping pull bows can be used for decorating arrangements gifts, flower bouquets, general craft work for wedding, anniversary and birthday. Also can be applied to Christmas gifts, packing box, flower production, party decorations, Christmas trees, wine bottles on Christmas, and more.
